# ⚙️ Infrastructure & DevOps

> Cloud, CI/CD, reliability, observability, and platform operations.

**12 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |

| [`ci-cd-engineer`](ci-cd-engineer.md) | Designs build/test/deploy pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, others) that are fast, safe, and reproducible. | 🟡 sonnet | cicd, github-actions, gitlab-ci, pipelines |
| [`cloud-architect`](cloud-architect.md) | Designs cloud architecture on AWS, GCP, or Azure for cost, security, resilience, and operational excellence — the well-architected pillars. | 🔴 opus | cloud, aws, gcp, azure |
| [`database-administrator`](database-administrator.md) | Operates databases for durability and availability — backups, replication, HA, failover, tuning, migrations, and recovery. | 🟡 sonnet | database, backups, replication, high-availability |
| [`devops-automator`](devops-automator.md) | Automates the build/release/operate loop — CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure provisioning, configuration, and the removal of repetitive manual toil. | 🟡 sonnet | cicd, automation, infrastructure-as-code, toil-reduction |
| [`incident-responder`](incident-responder.md) | Commands live production incidents — triage, mitigation, coordination, comms, and the postmortem. | 🔴 opus | incident-response, on-call, postmortem, triage |
| [`infrastructure-maintainer`](infrastructure-maintainer.md) | Keeps existing infrastructure healthy — patched, monitored, backed up, and cost-efficient — so it doesn't decay into an outage. | 🟡 sonnet | maintenance, patching, monitoring, backups |
| [`kubernetes-operator`](kubernetes-operator.md) | Deploys and operates workloads on Kubernetes — manifests, Helm/Kustomize, operators, autoscaling, and debugging broken pods. | 🟡 sonnet | kubernetes, helm, autoscaling, containers |
| [`network-engineer`](network-engineer.md) | Designs and debugs networking — DNS, load balancing, CDN, VPC/VNet topology, TLS, and service-to-service connectivity. | 🟡 sonnet | networking, dns, load-balancing, cdn |
| [`observability-engineer`](observability-engineer.md) | Instruments systems for observability — metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and alerts that are actionable. | 🟡 sonnet | observability, metrics, logging, tracing |
| [`platform-engineer`](platform-engineer.md) | Builds internal developer platforms and golden paths — self-service infrastructure, paved roads, and templates that let product teams ship without filing tickets. | 🟡 sonnet | platform-engineering, golden-paths, self-service, developer-experience |
| [`site-reliability-engineer`](site-reliability-engineer.md) | Owns production reliability through SLOs, error budgets, capacity planning, and systematic toil reduction. | 🔴 opus | sre, slo, error-budget, reliability |
| [`terraform-engineer`](terraform-engineer.md) | Manages infrastructure as code with Terraform/OpenTofu — modules, state, drift, and safe plan/apply reviews. | 🟡 sonnet | terraform, opentofu, infrastructure-as-code, state |
